mockData.Giriş sayfası iOS Safari'de beyaz ekran: The login page throws a white screen error on iOS Safari. Users cannot access their accounts. This is blocking our entire team.
mockData.Veri dışa aktarımı bozuk CSV dosyaları o: Data export generates corrupt CSV files
mockData.1000 satırdan fazla dışa aktarırken CSV: When exporting more than 1000 rows, the CSV file is truncated and has encoding issues. We need this for our monthly reports.
mockData.API istek limiti çok kısıtlayıcı: API rate limiting is too aggressive
mockData.Entegrasyonumuz dakikada sadece 50 istek: Our integration hits the rate limit after just 50 requests per minute. We need at least 200 for our workflow automation.
mockData.500'den fazla kaydımız olduğunda ana kon: The main dashboard takes forever to load when we have more than 500 records. Performance is unacceptable for our team.
mockData.CRM'imizi Slack ile bağlamak ve yeni ver: We want to connect our CRM with Slack and get real-time notifications when new data comes in.
mockData.Büyük bir CSV içe aktarırken bazı satırl: When importing a large CSV, some rows fail but there is no error log. We cannot tell which records were not imported.
mockData.Ekip üyelerine görev atama ve kayıtlar ü: We need the ability to assign tasks to team members and leave comments on records.
mockData.Tarih aralığına göre arama yapılamıyor v: Cannot search by date range or use advanced filters. We need more powerful search capabilities.
mockData.Son 3 gündür hiçbir e-posta bildirimi al: We have not received any email notifications for the past 3 days. Checked spam folder too.
mockData.Karanlık mod seçeneği harika olurdu. Gec: Would love to have a dark mode option. I work late at night and the bright interface is hard on the eyes.
mockData.Hareket halindeyken bir şeyleri kontrol: It would be great to have a mobile app to check things on the go.
mockData.Ayarlar sayfası başlığında yazım hatası: There is a spelling mistake in the settings page header. Says "Settigns" instead of "Settings".
mockData.Bence uygulama pembe bir arka planla dah: I think the app would look better with a pink background. Just a suggestion!
mockData.Discord'daki gibi emoji tepkileri vermek: Would be fun to react to things with emojis like on Discord.
mockData.Üst kısımdaki logo çok küçük. En az 2 ka: The logo in the header is too small. Make it at least 2x bigger.
mockData.Oyunlaştırma özelliği uygulamayı daha çe: A gamification feature would make the app more engaging. Points for completing tasks!
mockData.Uygulama Türkçe dilini desteklemeli. Tür: The app should support Turkish language. Many users in Turkey would appreciate it.
